body_preview: - `python3 scripts/verify_evo_readiness.py` crashes with `KeyError: 'warnings'` when `audit-log/` has no session directories. - The early-return dict at line 268 returns `{"classification": "not_ready", "can_drive_evolution": False, "session_id": None, "issues": [...], "evidence": {}}` — missing the `"warnings"` key. - `main()` at line 591 unconditionally it
expected_evidence: Task lineage links `scripts/verify_evo_readiness.py` to this task Future assessor self-tests pass without the KeyError crash No regression in existing readiness classifications Implementation Notes: The fix is a single line: add `"warnings": [],` to the dict literal at line 268 in the `readiness_report()` function. The early-return dict currently has: `"clas
title: Fix verify_evo_readiness.py KeyError crash when no audit sessions exist
